facilities.name: Atlanta Recycles Day at Greenbriar Mall
facilities.hours: Typically held on selected Saturdays from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM. Check the City of Atlanta schedule before visiting.
facilities.fees: Typically free for City of Atlanta residents. Confirm current item caps and event rules before arrival.
not_accepted: Items outside the posted event list
facilities.rules: Resident-focused city event. Verify the monthly schedule, item caps, and any ID or address requirements before driving.

facilities.name: CHaRM Atlanta
facilities.hours: By appointment. Check current booking windows and posted hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Material-specific fees apply. Review the current CHaRM pricing list before arrival.
not_accepted: Items outside the posted CHaRM list
facilities.rules: Best for hard-to-recycle and household hazardous materials. Use the official accepted-items list and appointment system before you drive.

facilities.name: CHaRM DeKalb
facilities.hours: By appointment. Confirm the latest booking rules and operating hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Material-specific fees apply. Check the official CHaRM DeKalb fee list before arrival.
not_accepted: Items outside the posted CHaRM list
facilities.rules: Appointment-based drop-off for hard-to-recycle and household hazardous items. Always review the current accepted-items list before driving.

facilities.name: Merk Miles Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Check the City of South Fulton page for current gate hours and holiday closures.
facilities.fees: Confirm current disposal fees and payment rules directly with the operator before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official station page to confirm who can use the site, what loads are accepted, and whether any residency rules apply.

facilities.name: Seminole Road Landfill
facilities.hours: Check DeKalb County Sanitation for current landfill hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type and disposal category. Verify current tipping rules before arrival.
facilities.rules: DeKalb notes a resident tire limit of up to 10 passenger car tires. Always confirm current landfill rules and any required paperwork before driving.

facilities.name: Central Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Check DeKalb County for current operating hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Commercial tipping fees may apply. Verify current rate and account requirements before arrival.
accepted_materials: Municipal solid waste from commercial collection vehicles
Yard trimmings from commercial collection vehicles
facilities.rules: DeKalb County describes this site as commercial-only. Do not rely on it for residential self-haul unless the county updates the rule.

facilities.name: North Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Check DeKalb County for current operating hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Commercial tipping fees may apply. Verify current rate and account rules before arrival.
accepted_materials: Municipal solid waste from commercial collection vehicles
Yard trimmings from commercial collection vehicles
facilities.rules: County listing describes this station as commercial-only. Confirm eligibility before driving any self-haul load.

facilities.name: Roswell Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Check the City of Roswell page for current daily hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Business drop-off can involve fees on designated days. Confirm current fee policy before arrival.
facilities.rules: Roswell residents and businesses can use the recycling center. Review the accepted-items list and business-day rules before you drive.

facilities.name: Roswell Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Check the City of Roswell page for current transfer station hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Fees can vary by load type and residency. Confirm the latest schedule and rate sheet before arrival.
facilities.rules: Roswell states that residents and non-residents may bring non-construction items, but construction materials are limited to Roswell residents. Bring the right proof if you want resident access or rates.

facilities.name: Smyrna Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Check the City of Smyrna page for current operating hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Some specialty items such as TVs, monitors, and paint can carry fees. Confirm the current fee list before arrival.
facilities.rules: Smyrna allows resident and non-resident use. Materials should be clean, dry, and empty, and payment methods can vary by item type.

facilities.name: Keep North Fulton Beautiful Recycling Center
facilities.address: 470 Morgan Falls Rd, Sandy Springs, GA 30350
facilities.hours: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday, and Saturday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Check official updates before visiting.
facilities.fees: Some specialty recycling streams may carry fees. Confirm current pricing before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the Sandy Springs or KNFB listing to verify specialty items, fee-based streams, and any program-specific instructions before driving.
